title: Principal Frontend Developer at Intel India Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at Intel India Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Intel India Digital Technologies in Chandigarh offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Intel India Digital Technologies:
Intel India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Intel India Digital Technologies!
